# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next'
import { ReadableStreamDefaultReader, ReadableStreamDefaultController } from 'web-streams-polyfill'

async function readUserStream(request: NextApiRequest) {
  const reader = request.body as ReadableStreamDefaultReader<Uint8ArrayEventMap[0]['data']>

  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const controller = new ReadableStreamDefaultController<any>({
      enqueue(chunk) {
        if (controller.closed) return;
        reader.read().then(({ value }) => {
          if (!value) {
            controller.close()
            resolve(new Response(chunk));
          } else {
            controller.enqueue(value);
          }
        }).catch(() => {
          // If the ReadableStream ends unexpectedly, close the stream
          reader.closed && controller.close()
        });
      },
    })
  })
}

async function edgeFunctionHandler(req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) {
  const userDataStream = await readUserStream(req);

  // Create a writable stream from response and pipe the user data into it.
  userDataStream.pipeTo(res.writable).then(() => {
    res.end();
  }).catch((err) => {
    console.error(`Pipe failed: ${err}`);
    res.status(500).send('Internal Server Error');
  })
}

export default edgeFunctionHandler
